resources.string: NofAR needs precise location to show which region you are in and to align horizon labels while exploring offline.
NofAR uses the camera as a live viewfinder for Explore mode labels. Images are not uploaded.
Internet is required only in Prepare mode to download OpenStreetMap and elevation data.
Location access is required to detect which region you are in and to align horizon labels.
Location was denied. Open Settings to grant precise location access for NofAR.
Enable location for region detection and horizon alignment.
Move your phone in a figure-8 pattern to calibrate the compass.
